title: Team Communication Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger team communication foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Team Communication Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Team Communication Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good team communication foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Team Communication Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
